channel.title: Comments for page "Zero Hour"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Zero Hour"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Absolutely wonderful lead-in to the apocalypse itself. I'll admit that I didn't think too hard about how exactly the locusts escaped a nuclear detonation when I wrote SCP-3916, but this works excellently.

item.title: Zero Hour... literally!
item.content:encoded:
A cheer to all the teams, whether they made it or not, and to my own. Prototype_Toaster and DrMorris were great teammates, ready to give and accept crit, and it was a successful Doomcon for Team Cheesecake.

The last entry, irl, for Team Cheesecake. The end of the LARPA saga… and maybe the world.

Also noting here the characters of Petahn and Simmons have been redone, so expect a rewriting of Last of LARPA after the voting period ends.
